summary: Added private D1 verifier storage and helper functions for Site-scoped relation withdrawal capabilities. The new migration defines `site_registry_relation_capability_verifiers`; helpers create, look up active records by relation/site/capability family, read by id, and revoke verifier records without serializing raw secrets. Tests cover scoped lookup, active-vs-revoked behavior, no raw secret persistence, and separation from public relation rows.
residuals: Verifier helpers are not yet wired into the public relation transition route.
No Cloudflare Worker secret was created, rotated, or set.
PBKDF2-SHA256 v0 is documented in code as transitional Worker-compatible verifier storage, not a general password-vault posture.
